rows.label: qev065503_MSG0001
rows.name:
Are you a BLADE?
My name is Lucy, and I am involved in
Doll development research.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065503_MSG0002
rows.name:
I am currently on break, but...
Do you have business with me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065503_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask her what kind of personality she has.

rows.label: qev065503_SEL0021
rows.name: Tell her that Lyvia wants to meet her.

rows.label: qev065503_MSG0003
rows.name:
My personality?
Basically, I am only interested in my research.
Even I think I am a very boring woman.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065503_MSG0004
rows.name:
On my days off, I just do crossword puzzles the entire time.
The feeling of my knowledge filling in those blanks...
I absolutely love it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065503_MSG0005
rows.name:
...I am not good with men, but...
If there is someone who accepts me for who I am,
there are times I wish they were by my side.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065503_MSG0006
rows.name:
I am not good with jokes, so\I cannot understand it, but...
Is that some kind of joke?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065503_MSG0008
rows.name:
...It is not fun talking to someone like me, you know.
But... if he says he wants to meet me,
I wouldn't mind at least hearing him out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065503_MSG0009
rows.name:
As I thought, wasn't this some kind of joke?
To think such a wonderful person would desire me...
It's impossible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065503_MSG0010
rows.name:
I am just a boring woman who is only interested
in my own research.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065503_MSG0011
rows.name:
But he listens to the stories of a woman like that
as if it is incredibly fun.
He truly is... a good person.[ST:wait ]
